text: Describe your daily routine, including what you do in the morning, afternoon, and evening.
Write about your favorite hobby and explain why you enjoy it.
Describe your family. Who are they, and what do they do?
Write a short message to a friend inviting them to dinner at your place this weekend.
Describe the city or town where you live. What do you like and dislike about it?
Write about what you did last weekend.
You are looking for a new apartment. Write a list of things that are important to you and explain why.
Describe your favorite meal. What ingredients do you need and how do you prepare it?
Write about a trip you took recently or would like to take. Where did you go, and what did you do?
A friend is visiting your city for the first time. Write them a message with recommendations for things to see and do.
Write about your experience learning German. What has been easy, and what has been challenging?
Describe the weather today and explain how it affects your plans.
Write a short review of a book, film, or TV series you recently enjoyed.
Compare life in a big city with life in a small town. Which do you prefer and why?
Write about the advantages and disadvantages of working from home.
Describe a person who has had a strong influence on your life and explain why.
You read an article about social media's impact on young people. Write a response expressing your opinion.
Should public transport be free for everyone? Write an argument for or against.
Write about a cultural difference you've noticed between your home country and a German-speaking country.
Describe your ideal job. What would you do, where would you work, and why?
Write about a tradition or holiday from your culture and explain how it is celebrated.
Is it important to learn foreign languages, or will technology like AI translation make them unnecessary? Share your view.
Write a diary entry about an unexpectedly good day you had.
A friend is considering moving to Germany. Write them a message with advice based on your own experience or knowledge.
Write about the role of technology in education. Has it made learning better or worse?
Describe a challenge you overcame and what you learned from the experience.
Some people say that sports should be a mandatory school subject. Do you agree? Explain your reasoning.
Write about a place you would love to visit and explain what attracts you to it.
Discuss the importance of environmental protection in everyday life. What can individuals do?
Write a text comparing two different approaches to staying healthy: exercise vs. diet. Which matters more?
Explain the concept of 'work-life balance' and describe how you try to achieve it in your own life.
Write about a time you misunderstood something because of a language barrier. What happened?
Should children be allowed to use smartphones? At what age? Argue your position.
Describe a typical Saturday in your life.
Write about what motivates you to keep learning German even when it's difficult.
Describe your workspace or study area. What does it look like, and how do you keep it organized?
Should universities be free for all students? Present arguments for and against.
Write a text about the growing popularity of plant-based diets. What are the reasons, and is this trend positive?
Imagine you have won a travel voucher. Describe where you would go and what you would do.
Write about a skill you would like to learn and explain why it interests you.
Write an email to a recruiter expressing your interest in a software engineering position. Mention your relevant experience and ask about the next steps in the application process.
A recruiter contacted you about a job opportunity. Write a reply thanking them and asking for more details about the role and the team.
Write to a recruiter to follow up on an application you submitted two weeks ago. Politely ask about the status.
A recruiter has offered you an interview. Write a reply confirming the date and time, and ask whether the interview will be in person or online.
Write to a recruiter explaining that you need to reschedule an interview due to a scheduling conflict. Suggest alternative dates.
After an interview, write a thank-you email to the recruiter expressing your continued interest in the position.
A recruiter asks about your salary expectations. Write a professional response that addresses the question without committing to a specific number too early.
Write to a recruiter to decline a job offer politely. Thank them for the opportunity and explain your decision briefly.
A recruiter asks you to describe your strengths and why you are a good fit for the role. Write a concise response.
Write to a recruiter asking whether the company offers remote work options or flexible working hours.
You received a rejection email. Write a professional reply thanking the recruiter and asking if they have feedback on your application.
A recruiter found your profile on LinkedIn and wants to connect. Write a reply introducing yourself and expressing interest.
Write to a recruiter asking about the company culture and what a typical workday looks like for the advertised position.
You want to transition into a new field. Write to a recruiter explaining your background and why you believe your skills are transferable.
Write to a recruiter to accept a job offer. Confirm the start date and ask about any documents you need to provide.
Write the opening paragraph of a cover letter for a marketing position. Explain why you are interested in the company and what makes you a strong candidate.
Write a cover letter for an internship at a German company. You are a university student looking for practical experience in your field of study.
Write the main body of a cover letter highlighting your relevant work experience and how it prepares you for the advertised role.
Write a cover letter for a customer service position. Emphasize your communication skills and experience working with people.
Write a cover letter for a teaching assistant position at a German university. Highlight your academic background and any relevant tutoring experience.
Write a speculative cover letter to a company you admire, even though they don't have an open position listed. Explain what you could contribute.
Write the closing paragraph of a cover letter. Express your enthusiasm for the role, mention your availability for an interview, and thank the reader.
Write a cover letter for a junior developer position at a startup. Convey enthusiasm for the product and willingness to learn.
Write a cover letter explaining a career change. You are moving from finance to project management and want to explain why.
Write a cover letter for a position that requires German language skills. Describe your German proficiency and how you've used it professionally.
Write a cover letter for a part-time job as a student. Explain how you plan to balance work with your studies.
Write a cover letter emphasizing your teamwork and leadership skills, using specific examples from past roles.
Write a cover letter for a research assistant position. Highlight your analytical skills and any relevant publications or projects.
Write a cover letter for a position abroad. Explain your motivation for working in a German-speaking country.
Write a cover letter for a volunteer position at a non-profit organization. Explain why the cause matters to you.
Write a letter to the Einwohnermeldeamt (residents' registration office) to register your new address after moving.
Write to the Ausländerbehörde (immigration office) requesting an appointment to extend your residence permit.
Write a letter to the Finanzamt (tax office) requesting clarification about a tax assessment you received.
Write to the Bürgeramt to request a replacement for a lost ID card. Explain the circumstances.
Write a formal complaint to a government office about a delay in processing your application.
Write to the Standesamt (civil registry office) to request a copy of your birth certificate or marriage certificate.
Write to the Arbeitsagentur (employment agency) to register as a job seeker and inquire about available support programs.
Write a letter requesting Kindergeld (child benefit). Explain your family situation and what documents you are enclosing.
Write to the Ordnungsamt to report a noise disturbance in your neighborhood. Describe the situation and request action.
Write to the Ausländerbehörde requesting information about requirements for permanent residency (Niederlassungserlaubnis).
Write a formal objection (Widerspruch) to a decision made by a government office. State your reasons clearly.
Write to the Kfz-Zulassungsstelle (vehicle registration office) to register a vehicle you recently purchased.
Write to the Jugendamt (youth welfare office) requesting information about childcare options in your area.
Write to the Gesundheitsamt (health department) to report a hygiene issue at a local restaurant.
Write a letter accompanying an application for German citizenship. Summarize your background and motivation.
Write to your landlord to report a broken heater in your apartment and request a repair.
Write to your landlord requesting permission to keep a pet in your apartment.
Your neighbor is very noisy. Write to your landlord describing the problem and asking for help.
Write to your landlord to give notice that you will be moving out. State the date and ask about the handover process.
Write to your landlord about a rent increase you believe is unjustified. Ask for an explanation and state your position.
Write to a new landlord introducing yourself as a potential tenant. Describe your situation and why you'd be a good tenant.
Write to your landlord to report mold in the bathroom. Describe the extent of the problem and request action.
Your landlord wants to schedule a viewing of your apartment for potential new tenants. Write a reply agreeing but requesting specific times.
Write to your landlord requesting a partial refund of the Kaution (security deposit) after moving out, as you left the apartment in excellent condition.
Write to your landlord about the Nebenkostenabrechnung (utility bill) you received. Ask for clarification on specific items you don't understand.
Write to your landlord asking whether you are allowed to sublet your apartment while you are abroad for three months.
Write to your landlord to request that the common areas of the building be cleaned more regularly.
Write a message to your landlord thanking them for fixing the issue you reported and confirming that everything is now working.
Write to your landlord explaining that you will have a guest staying for two weeks and asking if there is anything you need to notify them about.
Write to your landlord about a water leak from the apartment above. Describe the damage and urgency.
Write to your bank to request a new debit card because your current one was lost or stolen.
Write to your bank to inquire about opening a savings account. Ask about interest rates and conditions.
Write to your bank about a transaction on your account that you don't recognize. Ask them to investigate.
Write to your bank to close an account you no longer need. Ask about the process and any remaining balance.
Write to your bank requesting a change of address on your account.
Write to your bank to set up a standing order (Dauerauftrag) for your monthly rent payment.
Write to your bank to dispute an overdraft fee that you believe was charged incorrectly.
Write to your bank requesting a loan for a major purchase. Describe what it's for and ask about terms.
Write to your bank asking for a reference letter (Bankauskunft) to include with a rental application.
Write to your bank to request online banking access and ask for instructions on how to set it up.
Write to your bank complaining about poor customer service during a recent visit. Describe what happened and what resolution you expect.
Write to your bank requesting an increase to your credit card limit. Explain your reasons.
Write to your health insurance company to register as a new member. Ask what documents are needed.
Write to your insurance company to file a claim after a minor car accident. Describe what happened.
Write to your liability insurance (Haftpflichtversicherung) to report damage you accidentally caused to a neighbor's property.
Write to your health insurance to ask about coverage for a specific medical treatment or specialist visit.
Write to your insurance company to cancel a policy. State the policy number and the reason for cancellation.
Write to your insurance company to change your coverage plan. Explain what changes you want and why.
Write to your renters' insurance (Hausratversicherung) to report a burglary and list the stolen items.
Write to your insurance company asking them to explain a bill you received that seems higher than expected.
Write to your travel insurance to file a claim for a cancelled trip. Describe the circumstances and what expenses you are claiming.
Write to your health insurance company requesting reimbursement for prescription medication costs.
Write to your insurance company to add a family member to your health insurance plan.
Write a formal objection to an insurance company's decision to deny your claim. State why you believe the decision is wrong.
You read an article arguing that homework should be abolished in schools. Write a text expressing your opinion, with supporting arguments.
A newspaper published a report about the declining interest in reading among young people. Write a response discussing the causes and possible solutions.
Write a structured argument text: Should Germany introduce a speed limit on the Autobahn?
Many companies are replacing human workers with AI. Write a text discussing the social and economic consequences of this trend.
Write a text about the importance of cultural exchange programs for international understanding.
A study found that Germans are among the most satisfied workers in Europe, but also among the most stressed. Write a text discussing this paradox.
You attended a lecture on climate change. Write a summary of the key points and your personal response.
Write about the role of museums in modern society. Are they still relevant, or do digital alternatives make them obsolete?
Some cities are banning cars from their centers. Write a text discussing the advantages and disadvantages of car-free city zones.
Write a text about the challenges and opportunities of living in a multicultural society.
A friend says that learning grammar is a waste of time and that immersion is the only effective way to learn a language. Write a response presenting your view.
Write an essay on the question: Does tourism do more harm or good to local communities?
You read that more and more young people are choosing not to have children. Write a text exploring the reasons and societal implications.
Write a text about the advantages and disadvantages of online shopping compared to traditional retail.
Discuss whether governments should prioritize economic growth or environmental sustainability when these goals conflict.
Write a text about the phenomenon of 'fake news.' What are its causes, and how can individuals protect themselves?
A survey shows that people in Germany are spending more time on social media than ever before. Discuss what this means for interpersonal relationships.
Should voting be mandatory? Write a structured text with arguments for and against.
Write about the pros and cons of gap years before university. Would you recommend taking one?
Describe the role of volunteering in society. What motivates people to volunteer, and what do they gain from it?
Write a message to a colleague asking if they can cover your shift next Tuesday.
Write a message to a friend cancelling plans because you're not feeling well.
Write a note to your roommate about household chores that need to be done this week.
Write a text message to a friend congratulating them on their birthday.
Write a shopping list with a short note to yourself about what you need to buy and why.
Write a message to a friend telling them about a new restaurant you tried and whether you'd recommend it.
Write a short email to your German language course teacher explaining that you will miss class next week.
Write an online review for a product you recently purchased. Was it good value?
Write a message to a neighbor introducing yourself after moving into a new apartment.
Write a message to a friend asking for advice about which German language exam to take: Goethe, telc, or TestDaF.
Write a complaint to an online shop about a product that arrived damaged. Request a replacement or refund.
Write a thank-you message to someone who helped you move apartments.
Write a message to a classmate asking if you can borrow their notes from a lecture you missed.
Write to a doctor's office to schedule an appointment and briefly describe your symptoms.
Write a message to a friend suggesting you study German together and proposing a schedule.
Some people believe that animals should not be kept in zoos. Write a text presenting your opinion on this topic.
Is it better to rent or buy a home? Write about the advantages and disadvantages of each.
Write about whether standardized testing is a fair way to evaluate students.
Do you think electric cars will completely replace gasoline cars? Why or why not?
Should tipping be mandatory or voluntary? Share your perspective, especially comparing different cultural norms.
Write about whether social media companies should be responsible for the content users post on their platforms.
Some experts argue that a four-day work week improves productivity. Do you agree? Support your argument with examples.
Write about whether it is more important to preserve historical buildings or to allow modern development in city centers.
Is it better to learn a language by studying grammar rules or by immersing yourself in the language? Discuss both approaches.
Write about whether data privacy or convenience matters more in the digital age.
Should artistic and cultural education receive the same funding as STEM subjects? Present your argument.
Discuss whether international travel makes people more open-minded or simply reinforces existing stereotypes.
Imagine you spent a day without any technology. Describe what you did and how it felt.
Describe your dream house. Where is it, what does it look like, and what special features does it have?
Write a letter to your future self. What advice would you give, and what do you hope to have achieved?
Imagine you could have dinner with any historical figure. Who would it be, and what would you talk about?
Write a short story about a person who finds a mysterious letter in a used book.
Describe a perfect day from morning to night. What would you do if there were no obligations?
Write about an invention that doesn't exist yet but that you wish someone would create. What problem would it solve?
Imagine you are a tour guide in your city. Write the script for a short walking tour, highlighting three interesting spots.
Write a postcard from a vacation you wish you were on right now.
Imagine you are a journalist writing a feature about a small German town known for something unusual. Describe the town and what makes it special.
Write a message to your landlord asking about the rules for recycling in your building.
Write a formal email to a company requesting information about a product or service.
Write a text for a blog about your experience navigating German bureaucracy as a foreigner.
Write an email to your health insurance asking how to switch from public to private insurance, or vice versa.
Write a professional email introducing yourself to a new team after starting a new job.
Write to your bank to inform them that you will be traveling abroad and want to make sure your card works internationally.
Write to a German language school asking about their intensive courses, schedule, and fees.
Write a short bio about yourself for a professional networking site, in German.
Write an email to a colleague suggesting a new process or idea for the team.
Write a message to your gym or fitness studio asking about cancellation terms.
